tutorial1.title: 📖 Continue Reading
tutorial1.text: You can resume reading from where you left off or choose any Surah from the Surahs list.

tutorial2.title: 💾 Save Your Progress
tutorial2.text: Click on any Ayah number to save your progress and return to it later anytime.

tutorial3.title: 🎧 Play & Control Audio
tutorial3.text: Click on any Ayah to start audio playback. Use the controls to play, pause, and navigate between Ayahs.

tutorial4.title: 🎙️ Choose Your Reciter
tutorial4.text: Open the reciters list and select your preferred reciter from a wide collection.
